ddls:
CREATE TABLE "etfs" (
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF */,
  "etf_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the ETF */,
  "etf_name" TEXT /* Name of the ETF */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the ETF */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ETF (e.g., Financial, Technology) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the ETF was created */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) of the ETF */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* CUSIP (Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures) of the ETF */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the ETF (e.g., equity, fixed income) */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Annual expense ratio of the ETF */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the ETF */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the ETF was first listed */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the ETF information was last updated */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets under management (AUM) of the ETF */,
  "nav_price" REAL /* Net asset value (NAV) of the ETF */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the price entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the ETF */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the ETF during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the ETF during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the ETF */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the ETF */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the ETF */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the ETF */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume compared to the previous day */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_prices_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holds" (
  "hold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of ETF shares held */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ETF was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the ETF was purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the holding was last updated */,
  "purchase_source" TEXT /* Source from which the ETF was purchased (e.g., broker, direct) */,
  "last_purchase_price" REAL /* Last price at which the ETF was purchased */,
  "average_purchase_price" REAL /* Average price at which the ETF was purchased */,
  "last_sale_date" TEXT /* Last date the ETF was sold */,
  "last_sale_price" REAL /* Last price at which the ETF was sold */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the holding (e.g., active, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holds_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holds_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* Initial value of the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the portfolio is denominated */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy of the portfolio (e.g., growth, value, income) */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Risk profile of the portfolio (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  "last_rebalance_date" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio was rebalanced */,
  "next_rebalance_date" TEXT /* Next planned date for rebalancing the portfolio */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, portfolio manager, financial analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, closed) */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date the user last changed their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the signal (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "signal_date" TEXT /* Date the signal was generated */,
  "signal_value" REAL /* Value associated with the signal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the signal (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the signal (e.g., algorithm, analyst, news) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the signal (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the signal execution (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of ETF shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Total value of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time the trade was executed */,
  "broker" TEXT /* Broker through which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the trade */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance entry */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Percentage return of the portfolio */,
  "value_change" REAL /* Change in the value of the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "benchmark_performance" REAL /* Performance of the benchmark index */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the portfolio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the portfolio */,
  "information_ratio" REAL /* Information ratio of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_analysis" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the risk entry */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value at risk (VaR) of the portfolio */,
  "correlation_with_benchmark" REAL /* Correlation of the portfolio with the benchmark index */,
  "max_drawdown_period" TEXT /* Period during which the maximum drawdown occurred */,
  "value_at_risk_period" TEXT /* Period for which the value at risk (VaR) is calculated */,
  "stress_test_results" TEXT /* Results of stress tests on the portfolio */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Key risk factors affecting the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_analysis_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of the compliance check (e.g., regulatory, internal) */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the compliance check (true for pass, false for fail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance check */,
  "check_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the compliance check (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "next_check_date" TEXT /* Next planned date for the compliance check */,
  "responsible_party" TEXT /* Person or entity responsible for the compliance check */,
  "remediation_required" INTEGER /* Whether remediation is required (true or false) */,
  "remediation_status" TEXT /* Status of any required remediation (e.g., pending, completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the action was performed */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the action failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
